title: Dog instead of Cat Music Discs
description: This Resource pack Replaces the Cat Music disc with C418s remix Dog.
body:
# This Resource pack Replaces the Cat Music disc with C418s remix Dog.

When C418 made the disc Cat, he remixed it into Dog later that day. The song "Dog" was only in the Legacy Console Editions of Minecraft: it played after Cat.

The disc is still called Cat because there's a bug in the game where when you use the lang file to change the description of an item or block, it doesn't update in the game and it stays the same. [Vote to change it here!](https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/community/posts/37916987753869-Allow-Custom-Music-Disc-Descriptions-to-Be-Changed-in-Resource-Packs)
